column1: -  nil or rounded to zero (including null cells)
np  data not available for publication
(a) Wastewater supply is reported in total only; breakdown by industry and households is unavailable.
(b) Return flows = water discharged back to inland freshwater systems (e.g., rivers, lakes, reservoirs) by industries and households. Excludes water discharged directly to the ocean.
(c) Wastewater use is the collection of wastewater.
(d) Includes Agriculture; Aquaculture; Forestry and logging; Fishing, hunting and trapping; and Agriculture, forestry and fishing support services.
(e) Agricultural irrigation water use estimates for 2022-23 and 2023-24 are experimental and based on a new evapotranspiration modelling method. These estimates are subject to ongoing refinement.
(f) Includes Electricity supply and Gas supply.
(g) Household water use does not include self-extracted water (e.g. rainwater tanks, bore water).
